name: TaskFlow API
tagline: REST API for team task management
description: A production-ready task management API with authentication, role-based access, and real-time webhooks.
problem: Teams needed a lightweight alternative to heavyweight project tools — something developers could self-host and extend via API.
solution: Built a modular REST API with JWT auth, PostgreSQL persistence, Redis caching, and OpenAPI documentation. Deployed via Docker Compose with CI/CD on GitHub Actions.
features: Docker Compose for local and production deploys

name: Portfolio CMS
tagline: Headless content layer for this site
description: A JSON-driven content system powering this portfolio — projects, posts, and videos without a traditional CMS.
problem: The original Webflow CMS was hard to maintain and didn't support the custom dev workflow needed for ongoing updates.
solution: Migrated to a Next.js app with flat-file JSON content, preserving the original Webflow design while gaining full control over routing, performance, and new page types.
features: JSON content files with TypeScript types
Static generation for fast page loads
Webflow CSS preserved for brand consistency
Separate content models for client vs dev projects
